GIVKOIN — это социальная сеть с игровыми: GIVKOIN is a social network with game mechanics. Players communicate, develop a profile, participate in activities and together protect the Tree of the Universe from Darkness. It is not only results that are valued here, but also contributions to the community.
Что такое Отражение Души (Сущность)?: What is the Reflection of the Soul (Essence)?
Сущность — ваш персональный спутник в GI: The Entity is your personal companion in GIVKOIN. It reflects your activity and condition, affects some bonuses and is part of your progress in the project.
Как создать или сменить Сущность?: How to create or change an Entity?
Создание доступно в правой верхней боков: Creation is available in the upper right sidebar on the main page with the Tree (Soul Reflections tab). Changing the Essence is available once every 7 days and is confirmed separately. Important: when changing, key resources (lives, K, stars, chips, lumens) are completely reset.
Почему у Сущности разное настроение?: Why does the Entity have different moods?
Настроение рассчитывается по вашей актив: Mood is calculated based on your activity over the last 7 days: basic actions (solar charge, searching for an interlocutor, full chats, news), additional activities (battles, healing the Tree, bridges, etc.), as well as taking into account violations and debuffs.
Что дает сытость Сущности?: What does satiety give to the Essence?
Сытая Сущность дает +10% к Сиянию и позв: A well-fed Essence gives +10% to Radiance and allows you to maintain a joyful state. If the Entity is hungry, joy is not available: the mood is limited to calm or lower.
Корм покупается в магазине и применяется: The feed is bought in the store and used from the warehouse. 24, 72 and 168 hour satiety options are available. While the current satiety is in effect, re-feeding is blocked.
K — основная игровая валюта GIVKOIN. Она: K is the main game currency GIVKOIN. It is awarded for activity in the project and is spent on various in-game actions: from participation in activities to individual progress mechanics.
Люмены — энергетический ресурс. Их собир: Lumens are an energy resource. They are collected through Solar Charge, spent in the combat system, given to other players for help, and used to heal the Tree in case of injury. This is one of the key resources for team contribution.
Звезды — репутационный показатель игрока: Stars - the player’s reputation indicator (from 0.001 to 5.0). They increase for healthy communication and useful actions, and low values ​​signal problems in behavior and can limit opportunities.
Сияние начисляется за многие действия, н: Radiance is awarded for many actions, but is not stored on your personal balance. It automatically goes into the general fund of the Tree and is used to restore after damage in battles.
Как работает боевая система?: How does the combat system work?
Мрак появляется внезапно, без заранее об: The darkness appears suddenly, without a pre-announced schedule. When a threat arises, players band together to protect the Tree by spending lumens on attacks, supporting each other, and receiving rewards for their contributions. The outcome of the battle directly affects the state of the Tree.
Как устроено общение в GIVKOIN?: How does communication work in GIVKOIN?
Вы запускаете поиск собеседника, система: You start a search for an interlocutor, the system selects a match, after the chat you can give a rating, send a complaint in case of violations and add the person as a friend. The minimum time to communicate with a new person is 5 minutes. Before the dialogue begins, rules are displayed that it is advisable to follow for mutual respect.
Что такое Жизни и Фишки жалоб?: What are Lives and Complaint Chips?
Жизни определяют доступ к чатам: при дос: Lives determine access to chats: if you leave early, they are lost. Complaint chips - limit on filing reports of violations. These resources are needed to balance freedom of communication and responsibility.
Достижения фиксируют ваш реальный прогре: Achievements record your actual progress in different playstyles: social, combat, exploration and others. Rewards are given for unlocking achievements, and some of them are tied to rare behavior scenarios.
Зачем развивать профиль в GIVKOIN?: Why develop a profile on GIVKOIN?
Чтобы открывать больше возможностей, вли: To open up more opportunities, influence the team result and strengthen the personal account economy. The more consistent your contribution to activity, the stronger your long-term progress.
Сервер недоступен. Идут технические рабо: The server is unavailable. Technical work is underway.
